name: Duplicate Salary Annexure
first_round_test
script:
# # ===================================================== # # First Round Interview – Consolidated Scheduler Email # # ===================================================== # frappe.log_error( # "Running First Round Interview Scheduler", # "First Round Schedule" # ) # # ------------------------------------------------- # # Time window: today + next 7 days (PRODUCTION SAFE) # # ------------------------------------------------- # from_date = frappe.utils.nowdate() # to_date = frappe.utils.add_days(from_date, 7) # # ------------------------------------------------- # # Fetch First Round Interviews # # ------------------------------------------------- # today = frappe.utils.nowdate() # interviews = frappe.get_all( # "Interview", # filters={ # "interview_round": "First Round", # "scheduled_on": ["between", [today, frappe.utils.add_days(today, 7)]] # }, # fields=[ # "name", # "job_applicant", # "scheduled_on", # "from_time", # "custom_meeting_link", # "custom_location" # ] # ) # if not interviews: # frappe.log_error( # "No First Round interviews found", # "First Round Schedule" # ) # # ------------------------------------------------- # # Group interviews by interviewer # # ------------------------------------------------- # interviewer_map = {} # for interview in interviews: # interview_doc = frappe.get_doc("Interview", interview.name) # for row in interview_doc.interview_details: # if not row.interviewer: # continue # interviewer_map.setdefault(row.interviewer, []).append(interview_doc) # # ------------------------------------------------- # # Process each interviewer # # ------------------------------------------------- # for interviewer_email, interview_docs in interviewer_map.items(): # rows_html = [] # attachments = [] # sr_no = 1 # for doc in interview_docs: # applicant = frappe.db.get_value( # "Job Applicant", # doc.job_applicant, # ["applicant_name", "email_id", "designation"], # as_dict=True # ) # if not applicant: # continue # candidate_name = applicant.applicant_name # candidate_email = applicant.email_id # designation = applicant.designation or "Position" # interview_date = frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.scheduled_on) # from_time = doc.from_time # meeting_link = doc.custom_meeting_link or "" # meeting_link_html = ( # f'{meeting_link}' # if meeting_link else "Not Shared Yet" # ) # location = doc.custom_location or "Not Mentioned" # # ------------------------------ # # Candidate Email (INDIVIDUAL) # # ------------------------------ # if candidate_email: # candidate_message = f""" # # #

Dear {candidate_name},

#

Greetings from Vaaman Engineer (India) Ltd!!!

#

# As discussed, please join the interview on # {interview_date} at {from_time}. #

#

# Google Meet Link:
# {meeting_link_html} #

#
#

Regards,
HR Team

# # # """ # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[candidate_email], # subject=f"Interview Schedule – First Round ({doc.name})", # message=candidate_message, # delayed=False # ) # # ------------------------------ # # Resume Attachment # # ------------------------------ # resume_file = frappe.db.get_value( # "File", # { # "attached_to_doctype": "Job Applicant", # "attached_to_name": doc.job_applicant # }, # ["file_name", "file_url"], # order_by="creation desc", # as_dict=True # ) # if resume_file: # attachments.append({ # "file_url": resume_file.file_url # }) # # ------------------------------ # # Table Row for Interviewer Mail # # ------------------------------ # rows_html.append(f""" # # {sr_no} # {candidate_name} # {designation} # {interview_date} # {from_time} # {meeting_link_html} # {location} # # """) # sr_no += 1 # # ------------------------------------------------- # # Interviewer Email (CONSOLIDATED) # # ------------------------------------------------- # interviewer_message = f""" # # #

Dear Sir,

#

# Please find below the interview schedule for First Round. #

# # # # # # # # # # # {''.join(rows_html)} #
Sr NoCandidate NameDesignationDateTimeGoogle Meet LinkLocation
#
#

# Candidate Feedback Link:
# # https://ats.octavision.in/candidate-feedback # #

#
#

Regards,
HR Team

# # # """ # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[interviewer_email], # subject=f"Interview Schedule – First Round ({sr_no - 1} Candidates)", # message=interviewer_message, # attachments=attachments, # delayed=False # ) # frappe.log_error( # f"Interviewer mail sent to {interviewer_email}", # "First Round Schedule" # ) # ===================================================== # First Round Interview – Consolidated Scheduler Email # (ONLY LATEST RECORD / NO DUPLICATE EMAIL) # ===================================================== frappe.log_error( "Running First Round Interview Scheduler", "First Round Schedule" ) # ------------------------------------------------- # Fetch ALL First Round Interviews # ------------------------------------------------- all_interviews = frappe.get_all( "Interview", filters={ "interview_round": "First Round" }, fields=[ "name", "job_applicant", "scheduled_on", "from_time", "modified", "custom_meeting_link", "custom_location" ], order_by="modified desc" ) # ------------------------------------------------- # Keep ONLY latest interview per candidate # ------------------------------------------------- seen_candidates = set() interviews = [] for row in all_interviews: if row.job_applicant not in seen_candidates: interviews.append(row) seen_candidates.add(row.job_applicant) if not interviews: frappe.log_error( "No First Round interviews found", "First Round Schedule" ) # ------------------------------------------------- # Group interviews by interviewer # ------------------------------------------------- interviewer_map = {} for interview in interviews: interview_doc = frappe.get_doc("Interview", interview.name) for row in interview_doc.interview_details: if not row.interviewer: continue interviewer_map.setdefault( row.interviewer, [] ).append(interview_doc) # ------------------------------------------------- # Process each interviewer # ------------------------------------------------- for interviewer_email, interview_docs in interviewer_map.items(): rows_html = [] attachments = [] sr_no = 1 for doc in interview_docs: applicant = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, ["applicant_name", "email_id", "designation"], as_dict=True ) if not applicant: continue candidate_name = applicant.applicant_name candidate_email = applicant.email_id designation = applicant.designation or "Position" interview_date = frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.scheduled_on) from_time = doc.from_time meeting_link = doc.custom_meeting_link or "" meeting_link_html = ( f'{meeting_link}' if meeting_link else "Not Shared Yet" ) location = doc.custom_location or "Not Mentioned" # ------------------------------------------------- # Candidate Email (ONLY ONCE / LATEST RECORD) # ------------------------------------------------- if candidate_email: candidate_message = f"""

Dear {candidate_name},

Greetings from Vaaman Engineer (India) Ltd!!!

As discussed, please join the First Round interview on {interview_date} at {from_time}.

Google Meet Link:
{meeting_link_html}


Regards,
HR Team

""" frappe.sendmail( recipients=[candidate_email], subject=f"Interview Schedule – First Round ({doc.name})", message=candidate_message, delayed=False ) # ------------------------------------------------- # Resume Attachment # ------------------------------------------------- resume_file = frappe.db.get_value( "File", { "attached_to_doctype": "Job Applicant", "attached_to_name": doc.job_applicant }, ["file_name", "file_url"], order_by="creation desc", as_dict=True ) if resume_file: attachments.append({ "file_url": resume_file.file_url }) # ------------------------------------------------- # Interviewer Table Row # ------------------------------------------------- rows_html.append(f""" {sr_no} {candidate_name} {designation} {interview_date} {from_time} {meeting_link_html} {location} """) sr_no += 1 # ------------------------------------------------- # Interviewer Email # ------------------------------------------------- interviewer_message = f"""

Dear Sir,

Please find below the interview schedule for First Round.

{''.join(rows_html)}
Sr No Candidate Name Designation Date Time Google Meet Link Location

Candidate Feedback Link:
https://ats.octavision.in/candidate-feedback


Regards,
HR Team

""" frappe.sendmail( recipients=[interviewer_email], subject=f"Interview Schedule – First Round ({sr_no - 1} Candidates)", message=interviewer_message, attachments=attachments, delayed=False ) frappe.log_error( f"Interviewer mail sent to {interviewer_email}", "First Round Schedule" )
